dbt Global Circuit Series: Dubai dbt Meetup (in-person)

Hosted by Dina M.

Dubai dbt Meetup
4.4
15 reviews
Details

dbt Meetups are gatherings dedicated to helping you own your analytics engineering workflow. Events will focus on the impact of dbt in the data community and professional development tools for analytics engineers.

Expect big-picture conversations related to the data stacks, data operations, data teams, modelling, testing, dashboards, etc.

If you work with data, this group is for you! We welcome data analysts, scientists, engineers, architects, and more!

🤝 Organizer: Dina Mohammad-Laity
🏠 Venue: TBC

✨ Agenda & Speakers ✨

7pm: Arrival & social
7.30pm: Sathy Sannasi - Data Quality Pipelines
8pm: TBC - accepting speakers
8.30pm: social

To attend, please read the Health and Safety Policy and Terms of Participation: https://www.getdbt.com/legal/health-and-safety-policy

➡️ Join the dbt Slack community: https://www.getdbt.com/community/

dbt is the standard in data transformation, used by over 50,000 organizations worldwide. Through the application of software engineering best practices like modularity, version control, testing, and documentation, dbt’s analytics engineering workflow helps teams work more efficiently to produce data the entire organization can trust. Learn more: https://www.getdbt.com/

Read more

events.raw_text:

Tue, May 6, 2025 · 7:00 PM to 10:00 PM GST

St Regis Downtown

Marasi Drive, Business Bay, Business Bay, Dubai, AE 191984 · Dubai

How to find us
Report Ad
Operationalizing GenAI & AI Agents

Hosted by Dina M. and Rana S.

Dubai dbt Meetup
4.4
15 reviews
Details

Hey dbt Dubai!

Sorry for the long gap since our last event - we'll be back with a community meetup very soon.

For now, we have a new event to share with our friends at 5X. They have reserved limited seats for the dbt Dubai community. Spaces are limited so please register ASAP.

***
Data & AI Leadership Meetup on May 6 at a 5-star venue in Downtown Dubai—bringing together 50–70 senior data practitioners and leaders from top enterprise and tech companies.

The theme is: “Operationalizing GenAI & AI Agents: From Data to Deployment.” - how companies are moving beyond AI experiments and embedding AI into the heart of their operations, what it actually takes to move from POCs to production—including the data foundation needed, real-world use cases, and a live demo on multi-Agent RAG to drive real-world business decisions with responsible AI

Location: The St. Regis Downtown Dubai (Astor Lounge)

***

*To attend, please read the Health and Safety Policy and Terms of Participation: ***https://www.getdbt.com/legal/health-and-safety-policy

Read more
Speaker
Tarush Aggarwal, Kshitij Kumar, Elyse Elair, James Wang and Gaia Camillieri

Tarush Aggarwal : Founder at 5X, Ex-Head of Data at WeWork

Kshitij Kumar: Former Chief Data Officer at Haleon & Farfetch

Elyse Elair: Managing Director at EEA&Co International, Harvard Business Review advisor

James Wang: Head of AI/ML @ Alibaba

Gaia Camillieri: MD @ Mission Plus GCC)

events.raw_text:
Skip to content

Online event

This event has passed

Report Ad
Community AMA with Erica Louie (dbt Labs)
Network event
D

Hosted by dbt L.

Super Organizer

Dubai dbt Meetup
4.4
15 reviews
Details

REGISTER HERE 👉 https://www.getdbt.com/resources/webinars/community-slack-ama

🚀 Hey Community! Are you ready to dive deep, get insights, and satisfy your curiosity?

We’re hosting monthly live Ask Me Anything events! It's the perfect platform to quench your curiosity and get to know each other better. Don't miss out on this opportunity to connect and learn together.

What to Expect:

Discussing trends in the analytics space
Sharing key takeaways from the recent events
Hearing your questions and thoughts

Speaker: Erica Louie, Data @ dbt Labs
Host: Bolaji Oyejide, Digital Community Mgr @ dbt Labs
Topic: Careers in data, building a data team, the dbt Semantic Layer, and scaling your dbt project
When: November 21st @ 2pm EST
Where: Virtual and in #dbt-community-merge

Erica was the second employee at dbt Labs, then called Fishtown Analytics and she's seen dbt grow, a lot. In this AMA, Erica will share more on her career in data, her strong opinions on building a data team, how she manages her team, the dbt Semantic Layer, scaling your dbt project, and more on her Substack.

Register now to get the link to watch and join the #dbt-community-ama channel in Slack to participate live!

Read more
Speaker
Erica Louie, dbt Labs

Second hire at dbt Labs, former Head of Data, and now leading the product data team (and previously worked for BuzzFeed's data team), Erica "ric" Louie proudly hails from a liberal arts background (studied political science + italian) and grew her career in data at dbt Labs starting from the ground-up. She firmly believes that anyone can be a data practitioner with the right mentors, resources (sans trivial data jargon), and a good sense of humor. While rethinking the philosophy behind data systems, operations, and teams is one of her favorite topics, she enjoys thinking and writing about the human experience, and how it intersects with the work we choose to do and who we choose to do it with.

Hello dbt Dubai community!

Join us for an evening of socialising and knowledge sharing on Wednesday 31st July from 7pm at The Black Sheep, JLT.

It's a great opportunity to meet other members of the dbt Dubai community to discuss data and more!

Note: There will not be speakers at this event.

Please RSVP so we know how many of the community to expect. Looking forward to seeing you there!
